content: Quick fix: Signal Journal click-to-load + filter + bulk delete
Phase 3 backend: Optimizer (Optuna TPE + Grid + CMA-ES + walk-forward + heatmap + importance + robustness)
Phase 3 frontend: Optimizer page with progress, best-so-far, robustness, importance, heatmap, top-N alternatives, history
Phase 3 manual smoke test - Bayesian 150 trials end-to-end passed
Phase 4: Upstox OAuth + WS tick stream + Live Signal Console + OPTIONS BACKTEST (weekly expiry, paired INDEX+OPTION legs)
Phase 5: Probabilistic exit engine + meta-model + position sizing + event filter + VIX overlay + What-If + Telegram
